description_long: This lamp features a circular, slightly domed base supporting three cylindrical lamp heads, each mounted on an adjustable arm. The lamp heads are evenly spaced around the base, with each head featuring a prominent lens or cover at the front, likely for focused illumination. The arms are angled outward, allowing the lamp heads to be directed in different directions for broad area coverage. The surface of the lamp is a matte dark gray or black, with subtle vent-like details on the lamp heads for heat dissipation. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for outdoor or security lighting in urban environments. The construction appears robust, with all visible parts made from metal or metal-like materials.
description: A modern, triple-headed lamp with a circular base and adjustable cylindrical lamp heads, finished in matte dark gray. Designed for broad, directional lighting in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing all three lamp heads, with the central head facing forward and the two side heads angled outward.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the base and the outward tilt of the right lamp head.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the central lamp head and the symmetrical arrangement of the side heads.
description_view_3: Opposite angled side view, emphasizing the left lamp head and the smooth, domed base.
